title: GitHub Integration Setup
content:
Link CloudDesk with GitHub to track issues and pull requests alongside support tickets.

**Setup:**
1. Settings → Integrations → GitHub → Connect.
2. Authorize CloudDesk on GitHub — choose which repos to link.
3. Map GitHub repos to CloudDesk projects.
4. Configure sync rules: link PRs to tickets by mentioning ticket IDs (e.g., [CD-123] in commit messages).

**What Syncs:**
- GitHub Issues ↔ CloudDesk Tickets (bidirectional)
- PR status updates posted to linked tickets
- Commit messages containing ticket IDs auto-link

**Disconnecting:** Settings → Integrations → GitHub → Disconnect. Existing links remain but stop syncing.
